dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.intellij

    • Method Detail

      • ofInherited

        public static JkIntellijJdk ofInherited()

      • ofName

        public static JkIntellijJdk ofName(java.lang.String jdkName)

      • ofJekaJdk

        public static JkIntellijJdk ofJekaJdk(java.lang.String distrib,
                                      JkJavaVersion jdkVersion)
        Creates a JkIntellijJdk instance that represents a Jeka-managed JDK with the specified distribution and Java version.
        Parameters:
        distrib - the distribution identifier to include in the JDK name. If null, only the Java version will be used.
        jdkVersion - the Java version for the JDK.
        Returns:
        a JkIntellijJdk instance with a name in the format "jeka-{distrib}-{jdkVersion}" if `distrib` is provided, otherwise "jeka-{jdkVersion}".

      • of
